item.title: Nathan Fillion Says 'Firefly' Animated Series In Development - Deadline
item.description:
Nathan Fillion Says 'Firefly' Animated Series In Development    Deadline Animated ‘Firefly’ Reboot in Development From Nathan Fillion, 20th TV Animation    The Hollywood Reporter 'Firefly' Revival Being Developed as an Animated Series: Nathan Fillion    Variety Nathan Fillion's Big Firefly Tease Is a Canon Animated Series With the Original Actors Reprising Their Roles — but It Needs a Home    IGN Firefly is getting rebooted as an animated series    Engadget The Return of ‘Firefly’ Could Be an Animated Series    Gizmodo 'Firefly' cast to reunite for animated sequel series    Entertainment Weekly ‘Firefly’ Animated Series in Development, Original Cast Set to Return    TV Insider 2 decades later, Firefly returns as an animated series with controversial creator Joss Whedon's blessing    Polygon.com
Source: Deadline | Topic: firefly tv show
